title: Code Reviewer Harness
summary: Parallel code review harness for architecture, security, performance, and style, with a synthesis reviewer that merges findings into a single decision.

orchestrator.name: code-reviewer
orchestrator.description: Use when the user asks for a broad code review harness, PR review structure, or a role-based review team for architecture, security, performance, and code style.

activation_examples: 이 저장소에 맞는 PR 리뷰 팀 설계해줘

mode_matrix.notes: Default mode for broad repository or PR review.
Skip unrelated roles when the user only wants security feedback.
Focus on bottlenecks, waste, and scaling risks.

phases.name: Phase 1: Intake
steps: Extract the review target, language or framework, scope, and any PR-specific context from the user request.
Inspect the repository or diff and write the normalized review brief to `_workspace/00_input.md`.
Decide whether the request needs the full review team or a narrow review mode.

phases.name: Phase 2: Parallel Review
steps: Run style, security, performance, and architecture review in parallel when the request is broad.
Have each specialist write findings to its assigned workspace file and call out blockers or cross-role contradictions immediately.
If the request is narrow, activate only the relevant specialist role plus the synthesizer.

phases.name: Phase 3: Synthesis
steps: Read all specialist outputs and merge duplicates, overlaps, and contradictory recommendations.
Assign severity and action priority in `_workspace/05_review_summary.md`.
Return a final decision with required fixes, optional improvements, and residual uncertainty.

supporting_skills.name: vulnerability-patterns
supporting_skills.description: Language-aware vulnerability checklist for the security analyst.

supporting_skills.name: refactoring-catalog
supporting_skills.description: Refactoring patterns and code-smell remediation guidance for architecture and performance review.

agents.name: style-inspector
agents.description: Inspect naming, formatting, readability, comment quality, and local coding conventions.

agents.name: security-analyst
agents.description: Inspect trust boundaries, exploitable issues, unsafe defaults, and sensitive-data handling.
focus_areas: Injection, unsafe deserialization, and sensitive-data exposure
Security assumptions hidden in config or error handling

agents.name: performance-analyst
agents.description: Inspect latency, throughput, algorithmic waste, unnecessary allocations, and query inefficiencies.
focus_areas: Inefficient I/O, DB access, and caching opportunities

agents.name: architecture-reviewer
agents.description: Inspect module boundaries, dependency direction, cohesion, coupling, and long-term maintainability.

agents.name: review-synthesizer
agents.description: Merge findings from all review roles, remove duplicates, and assign final severity and action priority.
focus_areas: Resolve conflicts between correctness, security, and performance recommendations
Produce a final decision with severity ordering

reference_harnesses.reason: Closest existing Codex review harness with parallel specialist roles and a synthesis step.
